name: Ailumia
description: Operator and developer of an IT consulting platform. The company's platform is empowered by artificial intelligence technology to guide every aspect of their retail process, providing customers and sellers with solutions and resources for potential challenges in the e-commerce industry.

name: ALLSALE Corp.
description: AI-driven influencer marketing platform purpose-built for beauty brands leveraging the explosive growth of TikTok Shop in the U.S. The company addresses the increasing demand for automated, data-driven influencer campaigns that prioritize measurable ROI.

name: Apple
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to offer a wide range of baby-care products and essentials. The company's platform offers a wide range of infant goods that include but are not limited to diapers, wipes, skin care, oral care and cleaning products made from quality materials and ingredients, enabling customers to have access to affordable premium baby-care goods.

name: Belanjaparts
description: Developer of B2B e-commerce platform designed to digitize automotive workshops. The company platform offers various vehicle parts, other equipment, and lubricants at wholesale rates and quantities from various digital vendors, enabling small-medium workshops to market their products and supplies more effectively and efficiently.

name: Blackcart
description: Developer of an e-commerce artificial intelligence (AI) platform designed to transform an online store into an at-home showroom. The company's platform offers customers to try on items from their favorite brands at home using AI tools without an upfront commitment, enabling businesses to increase sales by offering a try before you buy experience to their customers.

name: Blissmo
description: Provider of an online retail platform intended to offer organic, non-toxic and eco-friendly products. The company's retail platform offers organic, non-toxic and eco products to shoppers across the web through flash sales and curated discovery boxes, enabling users to avail healthier, safer and better products

name: CandyClub
description: Candy Club Holdings Ltd is engaged in two components namely the B2C business and B2B business. Under the B2C business, the company sells subscriptions plans for the Candy Boxes in the USA, and the B2B business involves the selling of Candy Club Branded Confectionery to specialty market resellers in the USA. It has one segment, which is administration services in Australia.

name: Polymer
description: Developer of universal retrieval engine designed to help businesses connect external data sources to their large language models (LLM). The company's system connects external data to vector databases, enabling clients to ingest unstructured data wherever it is stored to enhance capabilities and insights for businesses using large language models.

name: Carousell
description: Operator of an online platform intended to simplify the process of buying and selling. The company's marketplace offers person-to-person buying and selling of products such as fashion items, home and living, mobile, and electronics among others simply by snapping a photo and posting a description of unused and secondhand clutter easily with free listings, enabling users to enjoy discounts and discover savings as well as save time and money.

name: Chaldal
description: Operator of an online shopping platform intended to offer groceries and daily essential products. The company's platform offers baby products, personal care products, pet food and groceries, enabling customers to buy goods of their own choice and get them delivered to their doorstep.

name: Chefs for Seniors
description: Provider of in-home meal preparation services intended to serve senior citizens. The company's services focus on placing a professional chef in homes to make customized, nutritious and affordable meals as per specific dietary concerns and preferences for the week, enabling aged people and senior citizens to avoid cooking meals for themselves, eat healthy food and stay independent.

name: Cuponomia
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to discover and share coupon codes. The company's platform gathers coupons that can be used during online shopping, helps to save money and gains benefits every time one makes a purchase over the Internet, enabling shoppers to avail desired discounts and cashbacks on their favorite products.

name: Curie
description: Developer of a 3D product generation platform designed to offer 3D shopping assistance. The company's platform allows shoppers to discover the best reviews and product news at the point of a camera, enabling customers to instantly educate and consense information and make purchases.

name: DealCart
description: DealCart is Pakistan’s super-app for groceries, consumer goods, and food delivery - delivering unbeatable prices and seamless savings via our in-app wallet.

name: DeporPrivé
description: Operator of a sports e-commerce platform intended for sports products. The company's platform features sports products like running shoes, tennis rackets, swimsuits, bicycles, and travel hammocks among others from renowned brands at a discounted price, enabling customers to buy sports goods and accessories online at accessible prices in a hassle-free manner.

name: Detoure
description: Developer of resale marketplace intended to source highly curated clothing from influencers and tastemakers, giving customers access to the most coveted closets in the world at thrift prices. The company helps to create a place to shop second-hand clothes directly from the style icons influencers and to provide a way for influencers to quickly capitalize on their most valuable asset their closet, enabling customers to sell their closet without spending valuable time building and maintaining a shop on other platforms.

name: EcomExperts
description: Operator of an e-commerce management platform intended to help businesses of all sizes succeed online. The company offers a wide range of features, including website design and development, marketing and advertising, and fulfillment and shipping, enabling businesses to sell their products and services to a global audience and achieve their e-commerce goals.

name: Edfa3ly
description: Developer of an automated personal shopping platform designed to help buy items from online stores. The company's platform offers shopping services along with payments to merchants abroad, international shipping, customs clearance and last-mile delivery, enabling customers to shop without country barriers.

name: enhance
description: Provider of business development services intended to build vertical marketplaces. The company's services include building businesses from the ground up, with the local market and consumers' needs in mind, and introducing mature models invested in by strategic global venture capital partners, enabling entrepreneurs from the Middle East and Africa to build mobile-enabled businesses.

name: Equipboard
description: From the gear your heroes play to personalized rig insights, expert reviews, and the best prices—Equipboard is your music gear concierge.

name: The Fit Body Co
description: Manufacturer of sports and nutrition supplements intended to offer carb and sugar-free protein drinks. The company's supplements consist of a variety of flavors such as chocolate, matcha, vanilla, chocolate, and latte, enabling women sports enthusiasts to achieve their physical and health goals easily.

name: Floward
description: Operator of an online flower delivery platform intended to deliver a wide range of flowers and gifts. The company's platform offers gifts like flowers, cakes, balloons, and chocolate boxes, according to different occasions like birthdays, anniversaries, and weddings, enabling users to send gifts and express their feelings and wishes to others by gifting them.

name: Freshop
description: Developer of an online platform for grocers. The company's platform helps in shopping groceries on the user's tablet and mobile device interfaces and explore various products.

name: Gloset
description: Operator of a digital e-commerce platform intended to provide second-hand clothes. The company's platform includes formal wear, party wear, sportswear, maternity clothes, shoes, and accessories, enabling customers to choose various fashion accessories at an affordable price.

name: GoodsMart International
description: Developer of online grocery delivery application designed to provide grocery products from a variety of local shops and suppliers. The company's application lets consumers purchase household products and groceries online with an early morning next-day drop-off time, enabling consumers to receive grocery and home products delivered straight to their homes and save time in the process.

name: Grain
description: Developer of an online food delivery platform designed to serve food delivery of different preferences through online orders. The company's platform offers everyday meals and catering services featuring chef-crafted meals made with fresh and wholesome ingredients, enabling users to order healthy and fresh meals and satisfy their food experiences.

name: Greentoe
description: Operator of an online shopping platform designed to facilitate people to set their own prices on appliances. The company's platform is an e-commerce negotiation website that offers various products directly from a network of certified retailers, enabling users to pay the price they want to pay for the electronics they want to buy.

name: Grove Collaborative
description: Grove Collaborative Holdings Inc is engaged in providing consumer products. It offers Cleaning accessories, Home and Pantry, Personal care products, Pets supplements and Other products.

name: Haseel
description: Developer of an online grocery application designed to offer fresh produce of vegetables and fruits available each season. The company's application provides users with the option to order fresh vegetables and fruits online and get them delivered to the location of their preference, enabling users to get an easy-to-use application that offers an affordable and convenient way to order groceries.

name: Homzmart
description: Operator of an internet retail platform intended to sell home furnishings. The company's platform sells home furniture, décor, lighting, and supplies through a visualized community with a wide range of variety and quality products, enabling homeowners to connect with home professionals to take advice and get home supplies at a low cost.

name: hotcake 夯客
description: Developer of merchant SaaS systems used in nail, eyelash, hairdressing and beauty industries. The company's products can be built with a dedicated reservation, membership and POS system, and integrates with user social media accounts, enabling users build fast access to live operations.

name: Jüsto
description: Operator of an online supermarket platform intended to provide doorstep delivery of food and other dairy products. The company's platform offers a wide range of fruits, vegetables, meat products, beauty products and house supplies, enabling customers to purchase healthy and fresh food products at affordable prices.

name: Kaodim
description: Operator of a home service platform intended to help users to find out the right vendor for their job requests. The company's platform depending on the service required by the users sends the quotes or assigns them to a vendor at a fixed price for house cleaning, plumbing, air conditioner servicing, and other related services, enabling customers to find a service provider according to their everyday needs.

name: Kilo
description: Provider of software and application development services based in Singapore. The company is currently operating in stealth mode.

name: Konvex (Wihom)
description: Financial operations automation platform for reconciliation, commission calculations, using no-code set up.

name: Media Lab (#LOOKEA)
description: Provider of an online shopping platform. The company specializes in selling apparel, shoes, watches, belts, bags, sunglasses, cosmetics and accessories through its online platform.

name: LNKO
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to offer trendy eyewear. The company's platform provides a collection of optic wearables for both men and women, enabling users to choose from a variety of frame styles and colors of eyeglasses.

name: Mapan
description: Developer of a payment and lending networking platform designed to increase access and income for low-income communities through technology. The company's platform is focused on eliminating barriers to financial access for the masses and offers cell phone airtime and bill-pay services and helps create employment opportunities for the poor, enabling users to access products more easily, safely and comfortably.

name: MyPowerSupply
description: Operator of a meal discovery platform intended to offer professionally prepared healthy meals. The company specializes in offering personalized meals pre-made and designed by local dietitians, nutritionists and chefs using good quality, sustainably sourced ingredients free of refined sugars, gluten and dairy for health-conscious consumers, enabling customers to indulge in freshly prepared food delivered to their doorstep.

name: Axamer
description: Ai employees for restaurants

name: MisterBnB
description: Operator of a property rental marketplace designed to connect travelers and hosts in the LGBTQ community. The company's marketplace offers a searchable database of short-term rentals of homes, rooms, and apartments for its users as per their preferred locations, enabling LGBTQ individuals and allies to monetize their spare space while providing affordable houses in a hassle-free manner.

name: Omniful
description: Developer of an operations platform designed for omnichannel retail and omnichannel management. The company's platform help retailers fulfill orders in minutes by instantly shipping online orders directly from physical retail stores and providing tools & software to help omnichannel retailers operate better, and faster, enabling brick-and-mortar retailers to operate more efficiently.

name: Orchard Labs
description: Developer of an online phone-based retail platform intended to make devices accessible to people. The company's platform connects buyers and sellers of used phones and helps bring down the cost of ownership by providing an inclusive return to someone selling their device, helping customers get an affordable option, and transact in a safe and hassle-free manner.

name: Pinshape
description: Provider of an online 3D printing platform. The company allows users to explore, share, download, and order 3D prints through their professional 3D print service.

name: Pixyalbum
description: Developer of a photo album creator application intended to simplify photo book creation. The company's application features photo uploading, editing, auto sync with social network accounts, and album delivery with free shipping, enabling users to capture special occasions and make photo books easily at low prices.

name: PlantShop.me
description: E-commerce store selling plants & gardening products

name: Pomelo fashion
description: Operator of an online e-commerce marketplace intended to offer fashion clothes and accessories. The company's marketplace offers clothes, shoes, and accessories for the fashion-forward consumer and works with designers to create house brand products, enabling consumers to bring more statements into their style.

name: PRIMIS
description: Allows merchants to anage post purchase customer experience communications, connect with over 400 couriers & achieve sustainability goals - all with one platform

name: Propagate
description: Developer of e-commerce incubator designed to acquire a majority stake in brands, scale, and exit to acquisition partners. The company services offer growth marketing, branding, data collection, customer service, and supply chain management, enabling businesses to elevate their brand image and increase their sales margin.

name: Public Goods
description: Manufacturer of direct-to-consume personal products intended to promote healthy and natural household essentials. The company's products include health-focused personal care and bathroom essentials that are healthy, cruelty-free, and contain natural fragrances with no added artificial colors or chemicals, enabling customers to receive personal care products that are sustainable and non-toxic at a single subscription price.

name: QiDZ Holding
description: Developer of a mobile application designed to help users find, plan, and book fun activities to do with kids. The company's application provides a one-stop destination for kids-related fun, education, entertainment, and activities for kids of all ages, enabling users to discover fun and educational activities, deals, and restaurants and book online instantly.

name: Quickshipper
description: Developer of a fleet management platform designed to assist businesses in managing their deliveries efficiently. The company's platform helps businesses boost their fleet productivity by providing necessary tools for daily operations as well as offering optimal roots to deliver the products, enabling shopping businesses to enhance their productivity.

name: Replyr.ai
description: Developer of a buy now pay later platform designed to change the way people finance their purchases. The company's platform integrates with websites or applications to give people the ability to split their costs and manage them through installment payments, enabling businesses to offer their customers the choice of paying in interest-free installments.

name: Invidica
description: Rerouting search engine sales into retail stores.

name: Retailo
description: Developer of an online marketplace platform designed to address issues within the informal retail market. The company's platform provides access to a list of suppliers and products to order along with delivery services, enabling retailers, manufacturers, distributors, and wholesalers to save money and improve their working capital requirements and inventory management.

name: Rosetta.ai
description: Developer of a customer retention platform designed to facilitate e-commerce companies in improving conversion and customer loyalty. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence technology to enhance customer conversion and retention by analyzing consumer preferences, and predicting inventory, and recommending products for online and offline during shopping flow, enabling e-commerce businesses to increase conversion and order value.

name: Shopeando
description: Provider of logistics services intended to simplify buying products directly from big Chinese e-commerce websites. The company's services offer delivery services of personal and business import products directly to the customer's doorsteps, enabling customers to get their desired products at the right time and place.

name: Shoppable
description: Developer of a distributed shopping platform intended to reduce the marketing budget. The company's platform revolutionizes affiliate marketing, integrates shopping experiences into paid search, display and social media and turnkey embeddable commerce options are available for websites, allows maximum flexibility on desktop and mobile, and holds multiple patents for universal checkout, enabling advertisers, retailers and publishers to create shoppable sites, content, advertisements, mobile applications and other commerce experiences.

name: SimpleHoney
description: Provider of a mobile application for creating create lists needed by users. The company offers its users with an application to make their wish list of the places and things they wish for and provide shopping packages accordingly.

name: Skinseoul Lab
description: Operator of a tech-driven e-commerce startup addressing global skincare market challenges through advanced AI and data-driven solutions while collecting and matching public information such as product trends, pricing, ingredient insights, and consumer reviews across multiple platforms to enhance its offerings.

name: SnapUp
description: Developer of a mobile application designed to track and shop products. The company's mobile application automatically identifies and recognizes the products saved as screenshots in mobiles camera roll, enabling users to move those products into lists, keep track of sales and other deals and then finally buy when the price is right.

name: Squares
description: Squares transforms the process of event hosting and workspace flexibility with a platform that gives you access to 2000+ locations where you can work, meet and create.

name: Stylemyle
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended for contemporary luxury fashion to sell dynamically-priced overstock collections. The company's platform offers apparel like dresses, jackets, bottoms, tops, workwear, and accessories like shoes, bags, belts, hats, gloves, and jewelry, enabling luxury boutiques and designers to turn unsold inventory into sales.

name: El-Dokan
description: Operator of an information technology consulting company intended to develop enterprise e-commerce software designed for large and growing retail stores. The company's expertise involves end-to-end software development and web application development for e-commerce businesses, enabling clients to focus more on their core businesses.

name: Trocafone
description: Operator of an online smartphone marketplace intended to help customers to buy and sell used phones and smartphones online. The company's marketplace improves the selling and buying experience by acquiring the devices from sellers, refurbishing and re-selling them as pre-owned certified, enabling buyers to enjoy various deals for peer-to-peer transactions combined with the service, convenience and safety of a retail store.

name: Una Brands
description: Provider of strategic branding services intended to accelerate e-commerce growth. The company uses significant growth capital to transform e-commerce brands by buying category-winning brands with a strong track record, high product quality, and great customer reviews, enabling businesses to grow into global, well-loved, and enduring household names.

name: Uniko
description: Operator of an online gift registry platform intended to assist couples to receive wedding gifts. The company's platform provides engaged couples tools to manage their registries and gives them the ability to ask for and receive cash in the lieu of household gifts, enabling couples to exchange gifts for cash or even receive customized gifts on the day of their wedding.

name: Wuilt
description: Operator of a website-building portal intended to help users create professional websites. The company gives them more control over their brand and customer experience and allows brands to create their own custom online store without having to worry about the technical aspects of running an e-commerce business, enabling users to take the hassle out of web design and build their own websites.

name: Zappli
description: Provider of a mobile-centric shopping features for consumer. The company enables consumers to create a universal account and buy from dozens of retailers in every single click.
